summary: Two notes exist: an ML Foundations course note on gradient descent and a reading note on the Transformer architecture.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: Covers gradient descent: the update rule, a worked quadratic example, and learning-rate failure modes.
areas.gap: Only the first ML Foundations note exists; momentum, Adam, and regularization are not yet covered.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: One reading note covers the Transformer: scaled dot-product attention, multi-head attention, and trade-offs.
areas.gap: No notes yet on efficient attention variants, positional encoding advances, or training recipes.
